stain.reason_2: 20%: Dirt or sweat from manual handling.
stain.reason_3: 5%: Rust marks from old machine parts.
stain.suggestion: Clean oil seals; enforce worker hand-hygiene protocols.

hole.reason_1: 80%: Broken needle hook or sharp part.
hole.suggestion: Inspect needle bed; replace dull hooks; test yarn strength.

horizontal.reason_1: 70%: Yarn feeder timing or tension error.
horizontal.suggestion: Recalibrate feeder timing; check bobbin winding pressure.

vertical.reason_2: 20%: Sinker damage or warp thread missing.
vertical.reason_3: 5%: Static buildup in the yarn path.
vertical.suggestion: Align needle frame; check sinkers for metal burrs or lint.

lines.reason_3: 5%: Rolling vibration in the machine frame.
lines.suggestion: Check machine mounting; stabilize tension rollers; check yarn.

broken stitch.reason_1: 85%: High thread tension or timing error.
broken stitch.reason_3: 5%: Blunt needle tip or low-quality thread.
broken stitch.suggestion: Reset rotary hook timing; reduce RPM; adjust tensioner.

needle mark.reason_3: 5%: Incorrect needle size for fabric weight.
needle mark.suggestion: Replace needles immediately; check latch movement/grooves.

pinched fabric.suggestion: Recalibrate pneumatic roller pressure; adjust presser foot.
